Hi Ian,

Pls find tmr's updates on KRJP P&L (both MP and SLS) accuracy and
profitability Updates as attached, let me know if you have any questions.
We will be covering:

   - KRJP P&L projection accuracy
   - KRJP P&L profitability
      - Negative P&L market Drill down
      - SLS P&L margin across mkts review

Best,

*Faye Yan*

Shopee | Cross Border

*Address:* 5 Science Park Drive, Shopee Building, Singapore 118265
